Tests the conversion of negative zero to a Boolean value in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Boolean` function in JavaScript when it is given the value `-0`. The assertion verifies that converting `-0` to a boolean results in `false`. This test is narrow in scope, focusing specifically on the conversion of the negative zero value to a boolean, which is a part of JavaScript's type coercion rules. The code is useful for ensuring that the `Boolean` function behaves as expected in this specific case.
